creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Boris Korzun from comment #5)

You are right, from https://wiki.freebsd.org/Bugzilla/TriageTemplates:
---
Reporter is MAINTAINER, doesn't set maintainer-approval (to +)

^Triage: Please set the maintainer-approval attachment flag (to +) on patches for ports you maintain to signify approval
---

Thanks, I will apply this rule from now on.
